meaning: adj.讲究的,罕有的,异国风味的
examples: "Sounds like a question from the more recherche type of television quiz show."
OTHER than being an ingredient of the more recherche sorts of salad, herbal tea or wine, dandelions are pretty useless plants.
Kayak to Recherche Bay, where you will find an 18th century French garden surrounded by thick forest and sweeping white beach.
More recently, he has been doing doctoral research at the Institut national de la recherche scientifique, a spokeswoman at the training university confirmed.
Son travail recouvre notamment la recherche, la conservation et la formation.
